title: polygala corbariensis
intro: Polygala corbariensis, also known as Carbarian milkwort, is a plant species that belongs to the Polygalaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to support immune function and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, Polygala corbariensis has been used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can also contribute to its health benefits like reducing stress and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Polygala corbariensis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and roots, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in creams and ointments.
